enum_values.name: Automatic
enum_values.summary: Automatic, chooses the most appropriate format for the current environment.

enum_values.name: WholeNumber
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ###. This format will not show fractions or decimals.

enum_values.name: OneDecimalIfValidDecimal
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ###.[#]. This format will not show fractions or decimals, unless the rounded decimal part is a non zero value.

enum_values.name: OneDecimal
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ###.#. This format will always show the value with one decimal.

enum_values.name: TwoDecimalsIfValidDecimals
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ###.[##]. This format will not show fractions or decimals, unless the rounded decimal part is a non zero value.

enum_values.name: TwoDecimals
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ###.##. This format will always show the value with two decimals.

enum_values.name: ThreeDecimalsIfValidDecimals
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ###.[###]. This format will not show fractions or decimals, unless the rounded decimal part is a non zero value.

enum_values.name: ThreeDecimals
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ###.###. This format will always show the value with three decimals.

enum_values.name: Fractional
enum_values.summary: As shown on the dialog: ### #/#. This format will always show the value with fractions.
